en.hero_title: Your expert for time‑critical transport solutions
en.service_sameday_air_desc: Same-day air transports worldwide with higher loading priority than express cargo.
en.service_sameday_rail_desc: Eco-friendly same-day transports on Deutsche Bahn long-distance trains.
en.service_sameday_road_desc: Time-critical road transport without size or weight limits, available 24/7.
en.service_nfo_desc: Global service on passenger & cargo aircraft with the shortest turnaround times.
en.service_obc_desc: Personally accompanied transports via 12,000+ multilingual couriers worldwide.
en.service_charter_desc: Designated aircraft chartered exclusively for your shipment to 1,700 destinations.
en.service_spare_parts_desc: In-night and next-day delivery network for critical spare parts across Europe.
en.sustainability_desc: We avoid, reduce and offset emissions through optimized routing, SAF investments and global reforestation projects.
en.contact_desc: Our logistics experts are available 24/7 worldwide.

en.alt_sameday_rail: Sameday Rail – slide titled 'Sameday Rail – sameday transports by train.'
en.alt_sameday_road: Sameday Road – slide titled 'Sameday Road – Transport by road without size and weight limitations, at any time.'
en.alt_nfo: Next Flight Out – slide titled 'Next Flight Out – global service on all passenger and cargo aircrafts.'

en.alt_charter: Charter – slide titled 'Charter – Designated aircraft for your shipment.'

en.alt_sustainability: Sustainability graphic – slide titled 'Sustainability in motion…'

de.service_sameday_air_desc: Weltweite Sameday-Lufttransporte mit höherer Ladepriorität als Expressfracht.
de.service_sameday_rail_desc: Umweltfreundliche Sameday-Transporte mit der Deutschen Bahn.
de.service_sameday_road_desc: Zeitkritische Straßentransporte ohne Größen- oder Gewichtsbeschränkungen, 24/7 verfügbar.
de.service_nfo_desc: Globaler Service auf Passagier- und Frachtflugzeugen mit kürzesten Umlaufzeiten.
de.service_obc_desc: Persönlich begleitete Transporte durch über 12.000 mehrsprachige Kuriere weltweit.
de.service_charter_desc: Exklusiv für Ihre Sendung gecharterte Flugzeuge zu 1.700 Zielen.
de.service_spare_parts_desc: Nachtexpress- und Next-Day-Netzwerk für kritische Ersatzteile in Europa.
de.sustainability_desc: Wir vermeiden, reduzieren und kompensieren Emissionen durch optimierte Routen, SAF-Investitionen und weltweite Aufforstungsprojekte.

nl.service_sameday_air_desc: Wereldwijde same-day luchttransporten met hogere laadtprioriteit dan expresvracht.
nl.service_sameday_rail_desc: Milieuvriendelijke same-day transporten met Deutsche Bahn.
nl.service_sameday_road_desc: Tijdkritisch wegtransport zonder grootte- of gewichtsbeperkingen, 24/7 beschikbaar.
nl.service_nfo_desc: Wereldwijde service op passagiers- en vrachtvliegtuigen met de kortste doorlooptijden.
nl.service_obc_desc: Persoonlijk begeleide transporten via meer dan 12.000 meertalige koeriers wereldwijd.
nl.service_charter_desc: Exclusief gecharterde vliegtuigen voor uw zending naar 1.700 bestemmingen.
nl.service_spare_parts_desc: Nachtnetwerk en next-day levering voor kritische reserveonderdelen in Europa.
nl.sustainability_desc: We vermijden, verminderen en compenseren emissies via geoptimaliseerde routes, SAF-investeringen en wereldwijde herbebossingsprojecten.
nl.contact_desc: Onze logistieke experts zijn wereldwijd 24/7 beschikbaar.

zh.hero_title: 您的时效物流解决方案专家
zh.hero_subtitle: 快速 · 可靠 · 全球
zh.about_fact3: 在3大洲六个办公处拥有320多名员工
zh.service_sameday_air_desc: 全球当天空运，负载优先级高于快件。
zh.service_sameday_rail_desc: 使用德国铁路的环保当天运输。
zh.service_sameday_road_desc: 无限制时效公路运输，24小时提供。
zh.service_nfo_desc: 在客运和货运飞机上提供最短周转时间的全球服务。
zh.service_obc_desc: 通过12,000多名多语对当快递员的亲自伴同运输。
zh.service_charter_desc: 为您的货物专门包机，飞往1700个目的地。
zh.service_spare_parts_desc: 欧洲范围的夜间和次日配送网络。
zh.sustainability_desc: 通过优化路线、SAF投资和全球植树项目来避免、减少并抵消排放。
zh.contact_desc: 我们的物流专家全球24/7不闲。
